message:
fix(render,text): add generation check to grapheme pool refcount and fix Cow method call

GraphemePool (grapheme_pool.rs):
- Add generation validation before incrementing refcount in
  mark_cells_in_use(): only bump refcount when the slot's generation
  matches the grapheme ID's generation, preventing stale references
  from inflating refcounts of recycled slots

Text wrapping (wrap.rs):
- Replace word.as_str() with word.as_ref() for Cow<str> compatibility
  in the preserve_indent branch, fixing a type mismatch after the
  kp_tokenize refactor changed content segments to Cow::Borrowed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
